mapper.select: select order_id, request_id, listing_id, seller_user_id, buyer_user_id, quantity, unit_price_snapshot, total_amount, delivery_mode_snapshot, listing_title_snapshot, status, escrow_txn_id, release_txn_id, refund_txn_id, auto_confirm_at, create_time, update_time from virtual_order where order_id = #{orderId}

select order_id, request_id, listing_id, seller_user_id, buyer_user_id, quantity, unit_price_snapshot, total_amount, delivery_mode_snapshot, listing_title_snapshot, status, escrow_txn_id, release_txn_id, refund_txn_id, auto_confirm_at, create_time, update_time from virtual_order where order_id = #{orderId} for update

select order_id, request_id, listing_id, seller_user_id, buyer_user_id, quantity, unit_price_snapshot, total_amount, delivery_mode_snapshot, listing_title_snapshot, status, escrow_txn_id, release_txn_id, refund_txn_id, auto_confirm_at, create_time, update_time from virtual_order where request_id = #{requestId}

select order_id, request_id, listing_id, seller_user_id, buyer_user_id, quantity, unit_price_snapshot, total_amount, delivery_mode_snapshot, listing_title_snapshot, status, escrow_txn_id, release_txn_id, refund_txn_id, auto_confirm_at, create_time, update_time from virtual_order where buyer_user_id = #{buyerUserId} order by order_id desc

select order_id, request_id, listing_id, seller_user_id, buyer_user_id, quantity, unit_price_snapshot, total_amount, delivery_mode_snapshot, listing_title_snapshot, status, escrow_txn_id, release_txn_id, refund_txn_id, auto_confirm_at, create_time, update_time from virtual_order where seller_user_id = #{sellerUserId} order by order_id desc
mapper.update: update virtual_order set status = 'DELIVERED', auto_confirm_at = #{autoConfirmAt}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId}
update virtual_order set status = 'COMPLETED', release_txn_id = #{releaseTxnId}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId}
update virtual_order set status = 'CANCELLED', refund_txn_id = #{refundTxnId}, update_time = current_timestamp where order_id = #{orderId}
